generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T PAULLINIA PINNATA. Paullinia pinnata, D. C. Natural order , Sapindaceæ. Common names (Brazilian), Guaratimbo, Timbo-sipo, Cururu-apé. Preparation , Trituration of the fresh roots. Authority. Mure, Pathogénésie Brésilienne. Authorites omitted. MIND. ► Fear of becoming consumptive (seventh day), [2] . ► Melancholy (first day), [2] . ► Sadness and drowsiness all day (first day), [2] . ► She wants to remain quiet and retired (third day), [1] . ► Lazy and disinclined to work (first day), [2] . HEAD. ► Dizziness; the head falls forward (third day), [1] . ► Obnubilation (first day), [2] . ► Heaviness of the head, with pain in the right temple (third day), [2] . ► Heaviness of the head and forehead (sixth day), [2] . [10.] ► Pain in the middle of the head, as if a nail were driven in (second day), [2] . ► Pain in the head, with inability to bend it forward, in the evening (seventh day), [2] . ► Very painful sensation as from an iron bar, compelling the head to bend forward (fourth day), [1] . ► Headache, as if the head was covered with a leaden cap, and then struck upon (second day), [1] . ► Headache, at night (third day), [2] . ► Headache all day (sixth day), [2] . ► Splitting headache (eighth day), [1] . ► Headache, in the morning (ninth day), [2] . ► Weight on the forehead, above the left eye, at 8.30 P.M. (first day), [2] . ► Pain above the eyes, piercing to the brain (first day), [2] . [20.] ► Pain in the right temple (first day), [2] . ► Pain in the left temple (second day), [2] . ► Hammering in the temple and above the left eye (fourth day), [1] . ► Headache in the right temple (fifth day), [2] . ► Hammering sensation in the vertex, felt painfully in the temples (sixth day), [1] . ► Headache on the left side (first day), [2] . ► Severe pain in the middle and right side of the head (first day), [2] . ► Pain in the right parietal region, like a pressure from within outwards (first day), [2] . ► Great itching and suppuration at the back part of the head (fifth day), [1] . EYE. ► Pains in the eyebrows, intersecting at the root of the nose (fourth day), [1] . [30.] ► Lancinations in the right eye, with lachrymation (tenth day), [2] . ► Pricking in the left eye, which weeps, and is much inflamed (fourth day), [1] . ► Redness of the sclerotica (fourth day), [1] . ► Profuse lachrymation, especially of the left eye (eighth day), [1] . EAR. ► Cutting pain in the cartilage of the left ear, extending to the left side of the neck (sixth day), [1] . ► Pain in the right ear (seventh day), [2] . ► Dull pain in the left ear, at 2 P.M. (third day), [2] . ► Heat in the ears (second day), [2] . ► Roaring in the left ear, for a quarter of an hour (fourth day), [1] . FACE. ► Sting as from an insect, below the right eye (third day), [1] . [40.] ► Lancinations in both jaws (first day), [2] . MOUTH. ► Pain in the right teeth (second and fourth days), [2] . ► Rough, swollen tongue (first day), [2] . ► The tongue feels as thick as a finger (third day), [1] . ► Dry mouth (first day), [2] . ► Bitter mouth (fifth day), [2] . ► Profuse saliva (fifth day), [2] . THROAT. ► Scraping sensation in the throat (first day), [2] . ► Digging in the throat (ninth day), [1] . ► Itching and formication in the throat (fourth day), [1] . STOMACH. [50.] ► Great appetite all day (tenth day), [2] . ► Very hungry at dinner-time (eighth day), [1] . ► Want of appetite (first and eleventh days), [2] . ► Desire for dainties (second day), [1] . ► Unusual desire for coffee and fruit (fourth day), [2] . ► Great desire to drink and smell coffee (fourth day), [1] . ► Loathing at the sight of food (fourth day), [1] . ► Loathing of food (second day), [1] . ► Loathing; tongue thick and clammy (after a few minutes, first day), [1] . ► Nausea, on waking (second day), [2] . [60.] ► Nausea (third day), [1] . ► Great nausea (sixth day), [1] . ► Sensation, while talking, as if a stone were buried deep in the stomach, for an hour (seventh day), [1] . ► Pain in the cardiac region, at 2 P.M. (first day), [2] . ABDOMEN. ► Pain, as from a tight cord, around the hypochondria (fourth day), [1] . ► Pain in the left hypochondrium (first day), [2] . ► Borborygmi in the right hypochondria (first day), [2] . ► Lancinations in the liver (third day), [2] . ► Transient pain in the hepatic region (first day), [2] . ► Bruised pain in the hepatic region, when touching the right ribs, worse when walking (second day), [2] . [70.] ► Lancinations in the splenic region, at noon (sixth day), [2] . ► Internal trembling in the umbilical region and left hypochondrium (first day), [2] . ► Pain, as from a penknife stab, in the umbilicus (fourth day), [1] . ► Pain around the umbilicus (sixth and tenth days), [2] . ► Painful stitches in each side of the abdomen (eighth day), [1] . ► Pain in the whole abdomen (fourth day), [2] . ► Colic, followed by a reddish diarrhic stool mixed with slime (second day), [1] . ► Pain in the whole abdomen, aggravated by contact (first day), [2] . ► Pressure in the hypogastrium (fourth day), [1] . ► Acute pain like a penknife stab in the hypogastrium, during a stool (fourth day), [1] . [80.] ► Crampy pain in the left side of the hypogastrium (fourth day), [1] . ► Lancinations in the left flank (third day), [2] . ► Pain in the left groin, at 8 A.M. (second day), [2] . ► Pain in the groin, as if the nerves of the thigh were cut (fourth day), [1] . STOOL. ► Diarrha (sixth day), [2] . ► Constipation for two days (fourth day), [2] . URINARY AND SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Frequent and ineffectual urging to urinate (second day), [1] . ► Great ardor urinæ (third day), [1] . ► Momentary stabbing sensation in the ovaries (eighth day), [1] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Hoarse voice (first day), [2] . [90.] ► Violent cough, with inflammation of the throat (seventh day), [2] . ► Dry and short cough (eighth and tenth days), [2] . ► Dry cough (eleventh day), [2] . ► Yellowish, bitter, difficult, and tenacious expectoration (first day), [2] . ► Bloated, streaked expectoration (seventh day), [2] . ► Short and rapid breathing, with nausea (first day), [2] . ► Short breathing (first and seventh days), [2] . CHEST. ► Oppression of the chest (eleventh day), [2] . ► Pressure as from an iron band around the waist; with pricking in the upper part of the thorax, worse during movement (seventh day), [1] . ► Pressure on the chest and sides, as if squeezed between iron plates, and then stabbed with a penknife, causing severe tearing pain (sixth day), [1] . [100.] ► Pain in the chest (sixth day), [2] . ► Burning in the chest, around the breast, which feels as if compressed by an iron band (fifth day), [2] . ► Intolerable itching, with burning sensation in the chest (fourth day), [1] . ► Burning in the chest (ninth day), [1] . ► Weak feeling in the chest (second day), [2] . ► The chest feels as if breaking open with a crack (third day), [1] . ► When drawing breath, the chest feels as if opened (eighth day), [2] . ► Pain under the sternum (seventh day), [2] . ► Burning in the front part of the chest (first day), [2] . ► Suffocation and burning in both sides of the chest (fourth day), [1] . [110.] ► Lancinations under the right breast, at 1 P.M. (third day), [2] . ► Lancinations in the right side of the chest, at 4 P.M. (fourth day), [2] . ► Acute lancinations under the right arm (third day), [2] . ► Lancinations in the right side of the chest, at 3.30 P.M. (sixth day), [2] . ► Lancinations in the right side of the chest (tenth day), [2] . ► Pain in the right side of the chest, at 7.30 P.M. (first day), [2] . ► Severe pain in the right side of the chest, at 4 P.M. (second day), [2] . ► Pain in the right side of the chest, under the clavicle and right axilla, at 6 P.M. (fifth day), [2] . ► Pain in the right side of the chest (sixth day), [2] . ► Pain in the right side of the chest (eleventh day), [2] . [120.] ► Pain in the left side of the chest, as far as the arm, as if it was scratched (ninth day), [2] . ► Pain in the left breast (first day), [2] . ► Lancinating pain, as if a knife were thrust into the left nipple, at regular intervals (sixth day), [1] . HEART. ► The pain in the heart extends to the last ribs, at 6 P.M. (first day), [2] . ► Lancination in the præcordial region (first day), [2] . NECK AND BACK. ► Pain in the right side of the nape of the neck, at 7 P.M. (second day), [2] . ► Pain in the neck (third day), [2] . ► Pain in the neck, relieved in the open air (fifth day), [2] . ► Burning all down the back (tenth day), [2] . ► Pain in the scapulæ (first day), [2] . [130.] ► Pain from the arm to the chest, at 8 A.M. (fifth day), [2] . ► Bruised pain in the loins; she cannot raise herself after stooping (ninth day), [1] . ► Pain in the left buttock (second day), [2] . EXTREMITIES. ► Bruised feeling in all the limbs (third day), [1] . ► Pain in the joints (seventh day), [2] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Numbness in the shoulders (ninth day), [1] . ► Pain in the right shoulder, disappearing by friction (ninth day), [1] . ► Pain in the right shoulder, at 1 P.M. (sixth day), [2] . ► Pain in the inner part of the right arm (fourth day), [2] . ► Pain under right arm (fourth day), [2] . [140.] ► Pain in the left arm when stretching it out (fifth day), [2] . ► Pain in the left arm, extending to the back (second day), [2] . ► Pain near the right elbow, at 9 P.M. (second day), [2] . ► Numbness of the arms (first day), [2] . ► Pain in the right wrist (seventh day), [2] . ► Acute pain in the left wrist (first day), [2] . ► Crampy pain in the left hand, for an instant (seventh day), [1] . ► Cramp in the palm and fingers of the left hand, extending into the arm (fifth day), [1] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Pricking as with innumerable pins in the upper part of the left thigh, for four or five minutes (sixth day), [1] . ► Rheumatic pain in the knees (sixth day), [2] . [150.] ► Trembling of the legs (first day), [2] . ► Weakness and heaviness in the legs (first day), [2] . ► Weariness of the legs (ninth day), [2] . ► Pain in the legs, which became stiff when walking (fifth day), [1] . ► Pain in the right ankle, as if sprained (ninth day), [1] . ► Numbness of the feet, after going upstairs (third day), [1] . ► Lancinating pain in the heel (second day), [1] . ► Numbness in the sole of the right foot, and in the knee (first day), [2] . ► Pain under the sole of the foot, when walking, increased by pressure (second day), [1] . GENERALITIES. ► Staggering gait (fifth day), [2] . [160.] ► Rigor, when rising, in the morning (fourth day), [1] . ► Profound ennui (second day), [2] . ► Constant ennui (fourth day), [1] . ► When walking, feels as if going backwards (first day), [2] . ► Desire to walk (sixth day), [2] . ► Inclination to lie down (first day), [2] . ► General lassitude (fourth day), [1] . ► Violent pressive pain, as if a stone were forced into the side (fifth day), [1] . ► Pain as if a knife were sunk into the right side (seventh day), [1] . ► Lancination as after chewing cloves; a persistent symptom (first day), [2] . [170.] ► She feels bruised all over (eighth day), [1] . SKIN. ► Eruption of red patches on the face and chest (first day), [2] . ► Ulceration of the legs, with itching (eleventh day), [2] . ► Intense itching under the left arm (ninth day), [1] . ► Itching in the hand and fingers, so that she scratches them raw (second day), [2] . SLEEP. ► Sleeplessness (fifth day), [2] . ► Very restless sleep (sixth day), [1] . ► Disgusting dreams about a leprous woman (first day), [1] . ► Dream about a leper with bleeding sores (third day), [1] . ► Dream about wanting to open the chest and look into it (sixth day), [1] . [180.] ► Dream about seeing a mangy dog approaching her, covered with sores; she takes hold of it, and it bites her; uttering loud cries, she awakes, and feels a great pain in the chest (eighth day), [1] . ► Dreams about dead people (fifth day), [2] . ► Vision of dead persons (fifth day), [2] . ► Sad dreams (seventh day), [2] . ► Dreams about dead people; wakes up in tears (tenth day), [2] . FEVER. ► Great coldness (second day), [1] . ► Great coldness of the arms, chest, and entire head, excepting the ears (third day), [1] . ► Coldness, at first in the upper part of the body, then all over (first day), [2] . ► Coldness all over, in the evening (second day), [2] . ► Coldness, at 3 P.M. (sixth day), [2] . [190.] ► Horripilation, with drowsiness and arthritic pains (sixth day), [2] . ► Alternate heat and coldness of the face (first day), [2] . ► Heat of the face (third day), [2] . ► Heat in the soles of the feet (fourth day), [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Headache; 8 A.M., pain in left groin; 8 A.M., pain from arm to chest; when rising, rigor. ► ( Noon ), Lancinations in splenic region. ► ( Afternoon ), Dull pain in left ear; 2 P.M., pain in cardiac region; 1 and 3.30 P.M., lancinations under right breast; 4 P.M., lancinations in right side of chest; 1 P.M., pain in right shoulder; 3 P.M., coldness. ► ( Evening ), Pain in head; 8.30 P.M., weight in forehead; 7.30 P.M., pain in right side of chest; 6 P.M., pain in right side of chest under clavicle and right axilla; 6 P.M., pain in heart extends to ribs; 7 P.M., pain in right side of nape of neck; 9 P.M., pain near right elbow; coldness. ► ( Night ), Headache. ► ( Contact ), Pain in abdomen. ► ( After going upstairs ), Numbness of feet. ► ( During movement ), Pressure around waist. ► ( Pressure ), Pain under sole of right foot. ► ( During stool ), Pain in hypogastrium. ► ( After stooping ), Unable to raise herself. ► ( Stretching ), Pain in left arm. ► ( When talking ), Sensation as if a stone were buried in stomach. ► ( When walking ), Pain in hepatic region; legs become stiff; pain under sole of right foot; feeling as if going backward. ► ( On awaking ), Nausea. ► Amelioration. ► ( Open air ), Pain in neck. ► ( Friction ), Pain in right shoulder. Clinical: Cramps; Diarrhœa; Head, pains in; Heart, pain in; Neuralgia

Hoarse voice. Violent cough with inflammation of throat. Dry cough. Yellowish, bitter, difficult, and tenacious expectoration. Short, rapid breathing. Numbness in shoulders and arms. Pain in wrists. Cramp in l. palm. Pricking as with innumerable pins in l. thigh. Weakness and heaviness of legs. Numbness of feet after going up stairs. Pain under sole when walking, by pressure. Staggering gait. Pressive and lancinating pains; as if stone or knife driven into side. Feels bruised all over. Pains in joints.

keynotes.text: Paul. p. is less well known than Paullinia sorbilis, better known under its name Guarana (see Vol. I.). It was proved by Mure, but I do not know of any clinical experience with the remedy. The predominating pains were lancinating, stitching, and pressing. Constricting pains as with iron bands or with iron plates. Head, abdomen, and chest furnished the largest number of symptoms. The symptoms were by motion; by inspiration. > In open air (neck); by friction (pain in right shoulder). There was an unusual longing for coffee─to smell and drink it. Sensation as if the chest opened on drawing a breath.

mental_emotional.text: Fear of becoming consumptive. Sad; drowsy; lazy.

head.text: Pain above eyes piercing to brain. Pain with inability to bend head forward. Hammering sensation in l. temple; in vertex. Headache as if head were covered with a leaden cap and then struck upon. Great itching and suppuration at back of head.

eyes.text: Pains in eyebrows intersecting at root of nose. Lancinations in eyes with lachrymation.

ears.text: Cutting in cartilage of l. ear extending to neck. Heat in ears. Roaring in l. ear.

mouth_throat.text: Pain in r. teeth. Rough, swollen tongue; it feels thick. Mouth dry; bitter. Profuse saliva. Scraping; digging; itching in throat.

stomach_abdomen.text: Appetite increased; or diminished. Desires coffee and fruit. Nausea on waking. Sensation while talking as if a stone were buried deep in stomach. Pain as from tight cord round hypochondria. Borborygmi. Lancinations: in liver; spleen; umbilicus; groins.

stool_rectum.text: Constipation. Diarrhœa. Colic followed by reddish diarrhœic stool, mixed with slime.

urinary.text: Frequent and ineffectual urging to urinate. Ardor urinæ.

chest_heart.text: Oppression. Pressure as from an iron band round waist; with pricking in upper chest, during movement. Pressure on chest as if squeezed between iron plates and then stabbed. Burning; itching; lancinations in chest. Chest feels if breaking open with a crash; while drawing a breath. Burning in chest across breast, which feels as if compressed by an iron band. Lancinations under r. breast. Pain in l. breast. Pain as of knife thrust in l. nipple at regular intervals. Pain in heart extending to last ribs, 6 p.m. Lancination in præcordial region.

back.text: Pain in neck > in open air. Burning all down back. Bruised pain in loins; cannot raise herself after stooping.

skin.text: Red patches on face and chest. Itching in hands and fingers so that she scratches them raw.

sleep.text: Sleepless. Sleep restless. Dreams: disgusting; of lepers; of dead people.

fever_chill.text: Coldness. Shuddering with drowsiness. Alternate heat and coldness of face. Heat: of face; of soles of feet. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
